cli.start.lifecycle.owner: greentic-start owns lifecycle execution for start/restart/stop of app and extension packs.
cli.start.lifecycle.operator_passthrough: greentic-operator and Wizard are passthrough UX layers that trigger greentic-start lifecycle actions.
cli.start.lifecycle.bundle_sources: Supported bundle refs: path, file://, http(s)://, oci://, repo://, store://.
cli.start.bundle.resolve: Bundle refs resolve through local paths or distributor-backed OCI mappings before runtime starts.
cli.start.extension_roles: Platform runtime packs are classified separately from optional extension packs so lifecycle boot can reason about core services.
